name: hemcss
description: A semantic-class CSS component library with OKLCH tokens, cascade layers, and zero Tailwind dependency.

scripts.build: pnpm build:schema && pnpm build:core && pnpm build:core:min && pnpm build:no-reset && pnpm build:no-reset:min && pnpm build:base && pnpm build:base:min && pnpm build:components && pnpm build:themes
scripts.build:no-reset:min: cross-env HEMCSS_NO_RESET=1 postcss src/index.css -o dist/hemcss.no-reset.min.css --env min
scripts.build:themes: pnpm build:theme:hanoi-light && pnpm build:theme:hanoi-dark && pnpm build:theme:saigon-light && pnpm build:theme:saigon-dark
scripts.build:theme:hanoi-light: postcss src/themes/hanoi-light.css -o dist/themes/hanoi-light.css && postcss src/themes/hanoi-light.css -o dist/themes/hanoi-light.min.css --env min
scripts.build:theme:hanoi-dark: postcss src/themes/hanoi-dark.css -o dist/themes/hanoi-dark.css && postcss src/themes/hanoi-dark.css -o dist/themes/hanoi-dark.min.css --env min
scripts.build:theme:saigon-light: postcss src/themes/saigon-light.css -o dist/themes/saigon-light.css && postcss src/themes/saigon-light.css -o dist/themes/saigon-light.min.css --env min
scripts.build:theme:saigon-dark: postcss src/themes/saigon-dark.css -o dist/themes/saigon-dark.css && postcss src/themes/saigon-dark.css -o dist/themes/saigon-dark.min.css --env min
scripts.build:components: pnpm build:component:btn && pnpm build:component:card && pnpm build:component:input
scripts.build:component:btn: postcss src/entries/btn.css -o dist/components/btn.css && postcss src/entries/btn.css -o dist/components/btn.min.css --env min
scripts.build:component:card: postcss src/entries/card.css -o dist/components/card.css && postcss src/entries/card.css -o dist/components/card.min.css --env min
scripts.build:component:input: postcss src/entries/input.css -o dist/components/input.css && postcss src/entries/input.css -o dist/components/input.min.css --env min
